novelty_flags.label: Proposition 1 (SCM-program representation)
novelty_flags.one_line: The claimed exact finite-SCM response-function optimization representation is covered at the stated level of generality by DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024; retain it only as a declared specialization/supporting lemma, not as a novelty-bearing result.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / honest_scope
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The strict-contraction question is conditional on the declared finite three-state, positive-mass, factorized shared-coarsening SCM and does not claim unrestricted-cardinality sharpness or inference.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: A positive-cell strict NDE-interval contraction UNDER ass:dag-npsem through ass:conditional-separation.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Reclassify Proposition 1 explicitly as a standard DuarteFinkelsteinKnoxMummoloShpitser2024 specialization and focus the contribution statement exclusively on the strict endpoint-exclusion certificate.

Add one fully specified rational 3-state candidate table with its response masses and proxy kernels, then report the endpoint gap or the exact failed certificate conditions; this turns the handle into a reproducible finite search target.
Add a boundary result identifying when the shared-coarsening model cannot improve the Sjolander/Breum interval, so the contraction witness is paired with an interpretable failure region.

recommended_next_step: Revise the supporting program-representation proposition to remove its already-published novelty framing, then advance the field-tier strict-contraction OEQ to Stage 0.
